timeline_description: Chronology of major events in world war ii.
title: Germany invades Poland
description: German forces invaded Poland, beginning the war in Europe.

timeline_description: Chronology of major events in world war ii.
title: Britain and France declare war
description: Britain and France declared war on Germany after the invasion of Poland.

timeline_description: Chronology of major events in world war ii.
title: Battle of France begins
description: Germany launched its western offensive through the Low Countries.

timeline_description: Chronology of major events in world war ii.
title: France signs armistice
description: France accepted an armistice with Germany.

timeline_description: Chronology of major events in world war ii.
title: Battle of Britain starts
description: Air fighting began over Britain.

timeline_description: Chronology of major events in world war ii.
title: Operation Barbarossa
description: Germany invaded the Soviet Union.

timeline_description: Chronology of major events in world war ii.
title: Attack on Pearl Harbor
description: Japan attacked Pearl Harbor, bringing the United States into war.

timeline_description: Chronology of major events in world war ii.
title: United States enters war
description: Congress declared war on Japan.

timeline_description: Chronology of major events in world war ii.
title: Battle of Midway
description: US naval forces defeated Japan near Midway.

timeline_description: Chronology of major events in world war ii.
title: Battle of Stalingrad begins
description: Major urban battle opened on the Volga.

timeline_description: Chronology of major events in world war ii.
title: German surrender at Stalingrad
description: German Sixth Army capitulated.

timeline_description: Chronology of major events in world war ii.
title: Allied invasion of Sicily
description: Allied forces landed in Sicily.

timeline_description: Chronology of major events in world war ii.
title: D-Day landings
description: Allied troops landed in Normandy.

timeline_description: Chronology of major events in world war ii.
title: Paris liberated
description: Allied and French forces liberated Paris.

timeline_description: Chronology of major events in world war ii.
title: Battle of the Bulge begins
description: Germany launched a major Ardennes counteroffensive.

timeline_description: Chronology of major events in world war ii.
title: Yalta Conference
description: Allied leaders met to plan postwar settlement.

timeline_description: Chronology of major events in world war ii.
title: Hitler dies
description: Adolf Hitler died in Berlin.

timeline_description: Chronology of major events in world war ii.
title: VE Day
description: Germany surrendered in Europe.

timeline_description: Chronology of major events in world war ii.
title: Hiroshima bombing
description: United States dropped an atomic bomb on Hiroshima.

timeline_description: Chronology of major events in world war ii.
title: Japan surrenders
description: Formal surrender ended World War II.
